name: smart-toc
description: an chrome extension that generates a table of content for webpage

scripts.start: cross-env ENV=development pnpm run build:background && rollup --config rollup.config.js --watch
scripts.build: cross-env ENV=production pnpm run clean && pnpm run build:content && pnpm run build:background && pnpm run build:chrome && pnpm run build:firefox
scripts.build:background: shx mkdir -p dist && shx cp -R src/background/* dist/
scripts.build:chrome: shx mkdir -p chrome && bestzip chrome/smart-toc.zip dist/*
scripts.build:firefox: pnpm run build:firefox:package && pnpm run build:firefox:source
scripts.build:firefox:source: bestzip firefox/smart-toc_source.zip src package.json README.md tsconfig.json rollup.config.js pnpm-lock.yaml

author: FallenMax@gmail.com
